The best cinema in town!!! Their service is excellent, the design of each room is clever with the exit on both sides so you don't have to pass the entire line to get out if your seat is at the end of the row. They do have vending machine which I think is very convenient and smart to purchase tickets. Absolutely love this cinema!!!
Good place to watch movies but need more cleaning inside of the cinema mall hall

ChIJvQcdAeuOGGAR7CHjoH_Pdnw.name: Keisuke Gyoza Bar
ChIJvQcdAeuOGGAR7CHjoH_Pdnw.address: Japan, 〒111-0032 Tokyo, Taito City, Asakusa, 4-chōme−18−７ メゾンフジ

reviews.text: I found Keiskue Gyoza Bar on Google and there are no words to describe how absolutely wonderful the experience was. I went with my younger brother, met some absolutely wonderful people, and had one of the best experiences I've had in Japan. The gyoza was, to quote my brother, an 11 out of 10. The atmosphere was warm and welcoming. It truly felt like we were in the kitchen with Keiskue. When I heard he brewed his own sake, I had to order a bottle to share with new friends. It was some of the best sake I've ever had. It was light, crisp, dry and dangerous. You don't taste the alcohol. Keiskue-sama, if you're reading this, thank you for one of the best experiences I've ever had.

A super cute and tiny spot, it feels more like stepping into someone’s home than a restaurant. The setup is really unique, you pick your own drink from a small bar hanging on the wall. The gyozas might not be the best you’ve ever had, but the overall experience is so charming that it totally makes up for it. I’d definitely come back just for that!

I would thoroughly recommend this to anyone.

Keisuke provided us with a wonderful and entertaining experience. We learnt to fold our Gyoza - we did terribly I might add - but being engaged in the evening was a joy.

The restaurant has about 6-8 seats and I ordered the sparkling sake which was delicious. For gyoza, we had mushroom and ginger, potato and cheese (so yum), vegetable seasoned with leek and garlic, and dipped these in a homemade miso dipping sauce.

Such a fun, delicious and entertaining night

ChIJDTq-ORWPGGARfLngswbJIWU.name: Awakening Cafe
ChIJDTq-ORWPGGARfLngswbJIWU.address: Japan, 〒110-0014 Tokyo, Taito City, Kitaueno, 2-chōme−23−９ イチロービル 4階, Ichiro Building 4th floor

reviews.text: Great little hole in the wall cafe. Staff was super nice and spoke excellent english. The prices were very good and I can't recommend the Carbonara enough it was delicious. I also had the Dessert waffles and the S'more hot chocolate the day before and they were excellent as well. The owner is super welcoming and wholesome.

highly recommended this cafe!! i don’t drink coffee often but this place was worth the stop! the service is amazing & people inside were very friendly/welcoming as well. cozy atmosphere to read or do work.

The atmosphere is okay.
They would asked to pay your order after they take your order.
Our drinks came 30 minutes after, then the food arrived almost an hour after. The last order came more than an hour after all the foods have been served.
If you have nothing to go to after, this is the place for you.
But if you have things to do expecting your drinks & food within 30 minutes, be ready to wait & wait.
Wonderful place for Theatre performance.
nice show
It says they are too tired to open. I hope they get better soon...

ChIJ8_V1CguPGGARYav_lMkiQGU.name: SANSOU CAFE
ChIJ8_V1CguPGGARYav_lMkiQGU.address: Japan, 〒111-0032 Tokyo, Taito City, Asakusa, 3-chōme−15−２ タンジェリン浅草

reviews.text: A hidden gem for healthy eating in Asakusa, vegan-friendly. I had shio-koji salmon and genmai onigiri, but the chicken tofu burger and vegan curry looked delicious too! The ambience was calming, the food nurturing, and the staff were very friendly and attentive. Will definitely come back with my vegetarian husband!

I ordered the Yakuzen curry with a chicken topping, and it was absolutely delicious! honestly, I thought the portion looked small at first, but I was wrong. It was actually very filling!
They also have a huge selection of drinks and cafe items. Asakusa is always so crowded, but this place was calm and relaxing—a true oasis. I definitely want to come back next time I’m in Asakusa!
I highly recommend this place for vegans and those on a gluten-free diet.

We stopped by this cafe while we were waiting for a dinner reservation and it’s a very welcoming and warm cafe with great staff and service. We had the vegan curry and appetizer dish with home cream cheese (bomb!). Also their glass of red wine was delicious. Stop by if you are in the area!

##### The London Buddhist Vihara

The London Buddhist Vihara is a leading centre for Theravada Buddhism. Founded in 1926 by Anagarika Dharmapala, the Vihara was the first Buddhist monastery to be established outside the continent of Asia. It has continued its task of disseminating the Dhamma with resident bhikkhus (monks) from Sri Lanka throughout this period, with the exception of the 1940s due to World War II. The Vihara moved to Chiswick during 1964 when the Anagarika Dharmapala Trust (ADT) of Sri Lanka purchased the freehold property at 5, Heathfield Gardens. In 1994 the Vihara moved to new spacious premises in The Avenue, Chiswick, London W4. In 2003, Vihara Management Committee (VMC) was formed to manage LBV acted as attorneys for ADT. The ADT also appointed the resident Dhammaduta Bhikkhus. In December 2020, the Vihar

## About Me

[](https://pizzeriacafe59.com/about-us/-2808787)

Just next to East Acton station our warm and friendly Cafe Pizzeria, opened from 6 o’clock in the morning welcome you with a nice cup of fresh grounded Italian coffee, fresh baked panini & traditional english breakfast. Around 10 o’clock when our stone wood fired oven is reaching the working temperature, we are ready to deliver you a true authentic taste of an Italian style pizza. We only use the finest & fresh ingredients so you can experience the love and magic of this amazing and popular dish. We also provide a selection of other authentic dishes like starters, pastas, grilled fish &meat as we want to satisfy all our customers. We are also vegan and gluten free friendly. Kids can enjoy the craft of the pizzaiolo as he spins the dough in our open kitchen.

Cafe Paolo is widely recognised for serving up best English Breakfast in London. Nestled at 1 The Vale in London, the place is a culinary gem that consistently leaves patrons raving about their exceptional dining experiences.

With a reputation for outstanding service, visitors find themselves in the warm embrace of a welcoming atmosphere. Whether it’s breakfast or any other dish from their diverse menu, every item delights with scrumptious flavours and impeccable presentation.

The cafe’s owner, Paolo himself, adds a charismatic touch to the dining experience, ensuring guests leave with smiles on their faces. From dreamy English breakfasts to delectable smoothies, Cafe Paolo offers a culinary journey that exceeds expectations.

The cozy, traditional setting makes it a perfect spot for those seeking delicious and affordable meals, while the staff’s warmth and attentiveness elevate the overall experience. Many patrons praise it as the best breakfast spot in town, with unforgettable food and atmosphere. Cafe Paolo is not just a place to dine; it’s an experience to savour, leaving customers eagerly planning their return visits. If you’re in search of perfect food, wonderful service, and a delightful atmosphere, Cafe Paolo at 1 The Vale is the place to be.

# Welcome to Barbican Cafe

![Image 2: Barbican Cafe](https://sitelift.site/barbicancafe/uploads/image00.jpeg)

### About Us

Barbican Cafe in Finsbury is a welcoming cafe and coffee shop serving delicious meals and expertly brewed coffee in a cozy setting. 

Whether you're looking for a hearty breakfast, a satisfying lunch, or a leisurely brunch, we have a menu filled with fresh, high-quality ingredients to start your day right. From classic breakfast favorites to wholesome lunch options, our dishes are crafted to suit every taste. 

Enjoy a relaxing atmosphere, friendly service, and the perfect spot to catch up with friends or grab a quick bite. Visit Barbican Cafe for great food, great coffee, and a warm, inviting experience.

# Looking for a cozy café in Finsbury?

Visit Barbican Cafe today for the best coffee and treats.

### Freshly Brewed Coffee

Enjoy our freshly brewed coffee, made from high-quality beans.

### Delicious Pastries

Indulge in our wide selection of freshly baked pastries.

### Hearty Breakfasts

Start your day with our hearty and healthy breakfast options.

### Lunch Specials

Check out our lunch specials for a delicious midday meal.

### Gourmet Sandwiches

Try our gourmet sandwiches made with fresh, high-quality ingredients.

### Artisan Teas

Relax with our selection of artisan teas, perfect for any time of day.

Markdown Content:
## Welcome to Tide Tables

![Image 1](http://www.tidetablescafe.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2018/06/welcome-image-1.jpg)

##### Not to be missed Tide Tables is the place to hang out all day and watch the world go by. Richmond is as little as 15 minutes from Waterloo by train, connected to the rest of London by underground and bus routes, this famous waterside cafe is marvelously situated right on the Thames at Richmond with one of the prettiest views of the river in the whole of London.

##### We are two sister cafes on the banks of the Thames at Richmond. One café in a converted arch beneath Richmond Bridge. The other café is in the middle of the famous flower gardens at Terrace Gardens. A great place if you’re alone or with friends. The food is strictly vegetarian, and there are vegan and gluten-free menus.Fairtrade and organic products are available, and we only use organic milk. We are licensed and serve organic wines, beers and ciders. We don’t charge extra for cow milk alternatives.

##### From January 2022 onwards we shall be making an extra charge for cow’s milk in our coffees to help keep plant milk low-priced for everyone.

![Image 2](http://www.tidetablescafe.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/9C19AEA2-7336-43B4-87D1-98CA9CB81F8F.jpeg)

![Image 3](http://www.tidetablescafe.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2018/06/iStock-626584462-800x800.jpg)

![Image 4](http://www.tidetablescafe.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2018/06/IMG_20180608_150906307-1.jpg)

![Image 5](http://www.tidetablescafe.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2018/06/IMG_20180608_151521572-1.jpg)

## Excellent selection of fresh juices, salads, pastries, cakes,

organic wines and beers.

![Image 6](http://www.tidetablescafe.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2018/06/Photo-01-04-2017-12-24-20_preview.jpg)

## Big selection of sweet and savoury dishes

## Stunning views over the Thames from our leafy garden.

#### Why meat is now 10x more deadly

![Image 7](http://www.tidetablescafe.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/IMG_6100-831x1024.jpeg)

**The northern lights, or the aurora borealis, were spotted over Richmond Bridge on the 10th of May 2024**

![Image 8](http://www.tidetablescafe.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/705728da-b7f8-4b29-9a80-16a77eaf8849-768x1024.jpg)

**A beautiful place to be!**

**Alfresco Dancing**

#### Thank you team for making this the magical event it is!

Title: Drury 188-189 - Rated Best Cafe in London and Covent Garden

URL Source: http://www.drury188189.co.uk/

Markdown Content:
## Welcome to Drury - Est. 2016

Welcome to Drury 188-189, recognised as the best cafe in London and Covent Garden on TripAdvisor thanks to our exceptional coffee, delicious brunch, and cost and inviting atmosphere. Located in the heart of Covent Garden, we offer a Wi-Fi-free space to disconnect from the madness of the city. Whether you’re here for a quick drink or a relaxing breakfast with a friend, our unique menu and lovely staff make Drury 188-189 the go-to spot for locals and visitors alike. Swing by and discover why we’re celebrated as being the top cafe in London today.

No booking needed. Walk-ins only.

## Help keep Drury the best cafe in London and Covent Garden

## We want to hear from you! Have your say. Tell us about your experience after visiting us and help others to find us!

## Latest news and updates

## Whats going on at Drury!

[![Image 1: Highest Rated Cafe London: Celebrating Eight Years of Excellence at Drury 188-189](blob:http://localhost/f124aa3d79c908e63bcdcb07ea0e77e1)](https://drury188189.co.uk/highest-rated-cafe-london-drury-188-189/)

[![Image 2: Introducing Our New Baklava Pancakes at Drury 188-189](blob:http://localhost/67ec908a98e6dc26ce4c05a4e1dc88c9)](https://drury188189.co.uk/drury-neighbours-top-5-must-visit-spots-in-covent-garden-copy/)

[![Image 3: Introducing Our New Baklava Pancakes at Drury 188-189](blob:http://localhost/67ec908a98e6dc26ce4c05a4e1dc88c9)](https://drury188189.co.uk/drury-188-189-baklava-pancakes/)

## Made with passion.

## Our Menu

At Drury 188-189, and its sister cafe Drury N4, we offer unique menus that have been developed by our talented chefs. Whether you’re enjoying looking for a healthy and nutritious lunch, or a sweet treat to indulge in – our menu has something for everyone.

To support our local community, our menu is crafted with care, using locally sourced ingredients to support nearby businesses. Each of our locations in London brings something special to the table.

Please select the menu for your preferred location below to discover what we have in store for you at one of the best cafes in London.

![Image 4: Best rated cafe in London and Covent Garden](blob:http://localhost/4e9b9e9935b9e0de213166d242eef8bc)

![Image 5: Outside of Drury 188-189](blob:http://localhost/beedf9aeccbca8768fc087be944b73ef)

## Breakfast, Brunch & Lunch

## Rated Best Cafe in London and Covent Garden

Find us in two iconic London spots—Covent Garden, home to the world-famous Drury 188-189, and Woodberry Down, home to our sister cafe Drury N4. Although part of the same brand, each location offers its unique menu and atmosphere. Check out our locations section below to plan your visit and view our opening hours here. We look forward to welcoming you to one of London’s best cafes, whether you’re visiting us in the heart of the city or venturing out to our modern concept in Woodberry Down.

## About us

## Two Best Friends On A Journey

Drury 188-189 began in 2016 as the passion project of two best friends from East London – Ali and Cemal who quit their 9-5 jobs in pursuit of creating a brand new concept in the independent cafe scene in London. Tired of corporate life, they wanted to create a cafe that had no wi-fi and encouraged people to relax with a great book or simply keep each other company and create new friendships. Eight years on, Drury is now one of the most beloved cafes in the city which reflects their commitment and serves as a testament of what can be achieved when you have an amazing team and a vision.Today, Drury 188-189 is the highest-rated cafe in London thanks to our amazing customers and their kind reviews throughout the years.

![Image 6: Drury Founders](blob:http://localhost/8016cae0e25a4f191d8f80a93016a308)

## How To Find Us

## Drury 188-189 (Covent Garden)

**Address:** 188-189 Drury Lane, Covent Garden, London, WC2B 5QD

## OUR STORY

Welcome to joon: a family-run, independent cafe driven by a love of culinary exploration and speciality coffee. Since April 2025, we’ve been honoured to proudly call the Warren Street neighbourhood home.

You may notice our menu is delightfully multicultural...so are we. We find joy in the union of global flavours and culinary traditions; we aim to offer a slice of home, wherever home may be. At our core is a belief that the true art of hospitality has the power to brighten every day.

In Farsi, ‘joon’ means life and soul. It can be used as a term of affection: ‘joonam’ means my life, my soul. For us, the love and dreams cemented in the walls here, and every customer that becomes family, is ‘our joonam’

### G-DRAGON 2025 WORLD TOUR [Übermensch] IN HANOI, PRESENTED BY VPBANK 

Lần đầu tiên, "Ông hoàng K-pop" G-DRAGON chính thức tổ chức concert tại Việt Nam, mở màn cho chuỗi World Tour do 8Wonder mang tới. G-DRAGON 2025 WORLD TOUR [Übermensch] hứa hẹn sẽ bùng nổ với sân khấu kì công, âm thanh - ánh sáng mãn nhãn và những khoảnh khắc chạm đến trái tim người hâm mộ. G-DRAGON sẽ mang đến những bản hit từng gắn liền với thanh xuân của hàng triệu người hâm mộ. Một đêm nhạc không chỉ để thưởng thức, mà còn để lưu giữ trong ký ức.

[Đặt vé](https://booking.vinwonders.com/vi-VND/g-dragon-2025-world-tour-in-ha-noi)[Khám phá sự kiện](https://8wonder.vn/event/g-dragon-2025-world-tour)

![Image 10: 8wonder](https://8wonder.vn/img/icons/brand-icon-chevron-right.svg?w=128&q=100)

![Image 11: 8wonders](https://static.8wonder.vn/public/bg_event_2d4252f5c7.png?w=3840&q=100)

## VỀ 8 WONDER

8WONDER - Lễ hội âm nhạc đẳng cấp quốc tế mở ra “kỳ quan cảm xúc không giới hạn" lần đầu tiên xuất hiện tại Việt Nam.

Tại đây, những sân khấu hoành tráng bùng nổ cùng âm nhạc đỉnh cao, các màn trình diễn mãn nhãn, lễ hội carnival rực rỡ, ẩm thực đa dạng và những trải nghiệm tương tác công nghệ từ tương lai – tất cả cùng hội tụ để tạo nên một hành trình đa giác quan không thể bỏ lỡ.

Không chỉ là nơi khán giả hoà mình vào không khí lễ hội âm nhạc chuẩn quốc tế, 8Wonder còn là cầu nối giữa âm nhạc toàn cầu và tinh hoa âm nhạc Việt, quy tụ những nghệ sĩ đã thành danh và thế hệ biểu tượng giải trí đang lên – cùng viết nên một diện mạo mới cho thị trường âm nhạc và sự kiện tại Việt Nam.

[Home](https://lbcoffeenyc.com/)

[Menu](https://lbcoffeenyc.com/menu)

[Visit](https://lbcoffeenyc.com/visit)

[Contact](https://lbcoffeenyc.com/contact)

[](http://instagram.com/lbcoffeenyc)

[](https://www.tiktok.com/@lbcoffeenyc)

LB (Elbi), meaning _my heart_ in Arabic, is more than just coffee.

A story of roots, resilience, and community in New York City.

![Image 1](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/68a4819d230af445c7e6a618/0bf4f0e7-3b9a-47fb-baf9-f717bedcb8b7/23_L_B_Coffee_January_2026_HR_Credit_Marc_J_Franklin.jpg)

When we found our little corner on East 84th Street we decided to make a place to gather, share stories, and bring a piece of mediterranean warmth and hospitality to the Upper East Side.

We’re rooted in tradition, poured with love, and have designed L B COFFEE to bring people together. Every detail, from the olive tree in our design to the Mediterranean bites, honors our roots while embracing New York’s fast rhythm.

Our menu is simple: artisan coffee paired with Mediterranean-inspired bites.

We believe small businesses change neighborhoods. We hope to grow into a space that creates experiences and elevated moments through events, community gatherings, and our products.

At the core of it all: community, heart, and delicious flavors.

We look forward to welcoming you to our shop,

L B COFFEE FAMILY

![Image 2](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/68a4819d230af445c7e6a618/29df125d-2f81-490d-9c5c-326e242a094f/99_L_B_Coffee_January_2026_HR_Credit_Marc_J_Franklin.jpg)

![Image 3](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/68a4819d230af445c7e6a618/5bb06314-6fec-453d-b6ca-96a1f1e1a787/Untitled+design+%282%29.png)

# Neue Galerie New York

Café Sabarsky concludes service at 5 p.m. today, Thursday, April 30, to prepare for this evening's performance of Cabaret at Café Sabarsky.

[Learn More](http://www.neuegalerie.org/programs/cabaret)

[Neue Galerie](http://www.neuegalerie.org/)

[Join & Support](http://www.neuegalerie.org/join-and-support)[0](http://www.neuegalerie.org/cart)

[Welcome,Willkommen](http://www.neuegalerie.org/visit)

Plan your visit to Neue Galerie New York.

![Image 6: Neue Galerie front doors](https://neue-gallery-images.b-cdn.net/f8c437124d3906af0f4ea01f3377e5e3dc7656dc-3600x2550.jpg)

[Egon Schiele &Dr. Erwin von Graff](http://www.neuegalerie.org/exhibitions/schiele-and-graff)

Through May 25, 2026

[![Image 7: Egon Schiele: Portrait of Dr. Erwin von Graff](https://neue-gallery-images.b-cdn.net/2013bd665d314e8f1de423c48097da33eb5e08ba-1435x1073.png)](http://www.neuegalerie.org/exhibitions/schiele-and-graff)

The show considers how Dr. Erwin von Graff's medical practice and personal support of Schiele influenced one of the most expressive and psychologically charged bodies of work in modern art.

[Austrian Masterworks](http://www.neuegalerie.org/exhibitions/austrianmasterworks)

Through May 25, 2026

“Austrian Masterworks from the Neue Galerie” features highlights from the museum’s extensive collection of Austrian art from the period 1890 to 1940.

![Image 8: “Austrian Masterworks from the Neue Galerie” features highlights from the museum’s extensive collection of Austrian art from the period 1890 to 1940.](https://neue-gallery-images.b-cdn.net/51917b5f3ed09cf54a7ec86f8b3ed4bc3b820669-6720x4480.jpg)

![Image 9: Portrait of Adele Bloch-Bauer I](https://neue-gallery-images.b-cdn.net/861961ee07bbc2967fa7ec70b2999eb7f9453da7-2336x1410.png)

[German Masterworks](http://www.neuegalerie.org/exhibitions/germanmasterworks)

Through May 25, 2026

“German Masterworks from the Neue Galerie” features highlights from the museum’s extensive collection of German art from the period 1890 to 1940.

![Image 10: “Austrian Masterworks from the Neue Galerie” features highlights from the museum’s extensive collection of Austrian art from the period 1890 to 1940.](https://neue-gallery-images.b-cdn.net/aeb280f09cc3013d2714405256c378f5362574be-1800x1686.png)

![Image 11: Neue Galerie NY](https://neue-gallery-images.b-cdn.net/c2275b9012e8eb38ea81c4df3825cd1c5341e72a-3442x2300.png)

WELCOME, WILLKOMMEN

Explore Neue Galerie New York, a museum of Austrian and German art and design from the early 20th century.

[Plan A Visit](http://www.neuegalerie.org/visit)

Make the most of your visit

[![Image 12: Café Sabarsky](https://neue-gallery-images.b-cdn.net/f2ebe7d43b57fb7f722a9702b031ffa6291302e5-1285x1600.jpg)](http://www.neuegalerie.org/cafesabarsky)

Dine

Café Sabarsky offers a modern take on the culinary heritage of Austria with a menu that reflects the history and allure of the Viennese café.

[Learn More](http://www.neuegalerie.org/cafesabarsky)

[![Image 13: Museum Tours](https://neue-gallery-images.b-cdn.net/a25518389b4ce95d618fcd784ef23b5a50847965-1440x1450.jpg)](http://www.neuegalerie.org/visit/tours)

Tours

Explore the range of options, including self-guided digital tours, private tours, and school visits.

[Learn More](http://www.neuegalerie.org/visit/tours)

## Now Playing

[![Image 1: Death Becomes Her](https://broadwaydirect.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/WFP-2062300-0126-01_DBH_053_PA_VIAL_HAND_ART_TICKETING_SITE_ASSET_UPDATES_011626_BroadwayDirect_ShowPage_MOBILE_1200x675.jpg)](https://broadwaydirect.com/show/death-becomes-her/)

## Ticket Information

**Box Office Hours**

 Monday–Saturday: 10:00AM–8:00PM

 Sunday: 12:00PM–6:00PM (one show day) & 12:00PM–8:00PM (two show days)

**Tickets**

 Purchase _Death Becomes Her_ tickets [online now](https://broadwaydirect.com/tickets/death-becomes-her/), or at the theatre box office.

**Group Tickets (10+)**Book[online](https://broadwaydirect.com/show/sweeney-todd/) or call 800-714-8452. Planning a visit with 10 or more theatregoers? Our team can help you secure group tickets to [_Death Becomes Her_](https://broadwaydirect.com/show/death-becomes-her/) at the Lunt-Fontanne Theatre, with support on dates, pricing, and the best seating areas for Broadway groups in NYC.

* * *

## Location

* * *

## Public Transportation

**By Subway:**

* * *

## About This Theatre

Opened in 1910, the Lunt-Fontanne Theatre was originally named The Globe, after Shakespeare’s theatre in England. It had a retractable roof to enable the theatre to stay cool and open during the summer. For nearly two decades, the theatre housed a variety of plays and musicals, until 1932 when it was turned into a movie house.

In 1958, the theatre was gutted and rebuilt in its present configuration as a legitimate theatre. It was renamed in honor of America’s foremost husband-wife acting couple, Alfred Lunt and Lynn Fontanne, who starred in its first production, _The Visit_. Theatregoers can enjoy a selection of photographs from their private collection on display throughout the lobby areas.

_Death Becomes Her_ is now playing at the Lunt-Fontanne Theatre.

The Lunt-Fontanne has 1,505 seats and is one of [The Nederlander Organization](http://nederlander.com/)‘s nine Broadway theatres.

### Now Playing – _Death Becomes Her_

Catch _Death Becomes Her_ on Broadway at the Lunt-Fontanne Theatre in NYC, where this darkly comic musical comes to life in the heart of the Theatre District. Find [official _Death Becomes Her_ tickets](https://broadwaydirect.com/show/death-becomes-her/) and seating options for your next New York theatre night out.

https://cafebewilderment.com/.title: Cafe Bewilderment
https://cafebewilderment.com/.content_markdown:
Title: Home - Cafe Bewilderment

URL Source: https://cafebewilderment.com/

Published Time: 2024-12-03T14:31:52+00:00

Markdown Content:
## Welcome to 

cafe bewilderment

##### We invite you to be wild and be: 

curious, connected, and completely yourself.

A hidden gem nestled inside of The Monocle on Hertel Avenue, where nature’s magic meets the **warmth of community.**

Step into our ethereal escape, a queer-owned haven inspired by the beauty of the forest and the **spirit of belonging.**Savor the artistry of locally sourced dishes, sip on handcrafted cocktails, and lose yourself in the **cozy, inclusive vibe.**

Whether you’re here for brunch, coffee, or a whimsical cocktail adventure, stepping into the forest is always a good idea…

## Discover the magic within…

Step into a piece of history at Bewilderment, tucked inside a beautifully renovated Jewish synagogue alongside a boutique furniture store, a barber studio, an apothecary, and a design studio. Discover a hidden oasis where curiosity and creativity come alive in the heart of Buffalo. 🌿

![Image 1: the bar at cafe bewilderment](https://cafebewilderment.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/cafe_3_optimized.jpg)

##### Quality Without Compromise

We use sustainable, locally sourced ingredients to craft every dish and drink. From high-end coffee roasted by Stumptown to pastries and elevated small plates, everything is carefully curated for flavor and freshness.

![Image 2: coffee, cup and saucer, black coffee](https://cafebewilderment.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/g74d4bbf79852b066a4e491d56cfd8a61377425c7897fddc505a4df6fd6513443fec075c730d0f4f6d928745d57ed2fcc0f49895120281816d8f5711683e82fcc_1280-1572740-1024x682.png)

![Image 3: the seating area inside cafe bewilderment](https://cafebewilderment.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/cafe_4_optimized.jpg)

##### Inclusive, Safe & Cozy

As a queer-owned cafe, we aim to create a safe, welcoming space for all. We’re here to foster connection and provide a sense of belonging for everyone who walks through our doors.

![Image 4: Cafe 6 Optimized](https://cafebewilderment.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/cafe_6_optimized.jpg)

##### Ethereal & Natural

Inspired by nature and curiosity, our design and atmosphere evoke a cozy, woodsy vibe. Whether you’re stopping by for a morning coffee, a midday treat, or an afternoon cocktail, you’ll leave feeling inspired and refreshed.

Title: Café Cassette - Paris 6 - brasserie parisienne

URL Source: https://www.cafecassette.com/

Markdown Content:
Menu

### Les apéros, le brunch, la musique et la convivialité au cœur du 6e arrondissement

![Image 1](https://www.cafecassette.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/Logo-Cassette-EL-Site-web.png)

Situé au cœur du **6ᵉ arrondissement de Paris**, sur la **rue de Rennes**, à deux pas de Tour Montparnasse et de l’Église Saint-Sulpice, **Café Cassette** est une adresse incontournable pour profiter d’un **brunch à Paris 6**, d’un **petit-déjeuner gourmand** ou d’un **restaurant convivial près de Montparnasse**.

Ouvert **7 jours sur 7**, le Café Cassette propose une **cuisine gourmande à base de produits frais et de saison**, ainsi qu’un **brunch généreux chaque week-end** dans une ambiance chaleureuse et fleurie.

![Image 2](https://www.cafecassette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/restaurant-cafe-cassette-paris-6-683x1024.png)

## Le restaurant

Au **Café Cassette**, découvrez un **restaurant à Paris 6** proposant une **cuisine gourmande et de saison**, servie en continu dans une ambiance conviviale. Situé à deux pas du Jardin du Luxembourg et de Tour Montparnasse, notre établissement revisite les **classiques de brasserie** avec des produits frais.

Linguine crémeux, burger frais et plats de saison composent une carte idéale pour un **déjeuner ou dîner près de Montparnasse**, au cœur du **6ᵉ arrondissement de Paris**.

## Le brunch

Chaque week-end, profitez du **brunch du Café Cassette**, une adresse incontournable pour un **brunch gourmand à Paris 6** située sur la **rue de Rennes**, près de Tour Montparnasse et de l’Église Saint-Sulpice.

Notre **brunch généreux** propose une sélection de plats salés et sucrés préparés avec **des produits frais et de saison**, dont des spécialités comme le **Norwegian Benedict** et l’**Avocado Benedict**. Une adresse idéale pour un **brunch convivial entre amis ou en famille à Montparnasse**.

![Image 3](https://www.cafecassette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/brunch-paris-6-rue-de-rennes-cafe-cassette-copie-683x1024.jpg)

![Image 4](https://www.cafecassette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/restaurant-pres-montparnasse-cafe-cassette.jpg)

## La terrasse

Profitez de la **terrasse fleurie du Café Cassette**, un lieu idéal pour déjeuner ou prendre un verre au cœur du **6ᵉ arrondissement de Paris**, près de Saint-Germain-des-Prés.

Ensoleillée et conviviale, notre **terrasse à Paris 6** est parfaite pour un **déjeuner entre amis ou un apéritif en extérieur** dans l’un des quartiers les plus emblématiques de Paris.

## Organiser un événement au Café Cassette

## Faites du Café Cassette l’écrin de vos moments spéciaux ! Que ce soit pour un anniversaire mémorable, un dîner entre amis, une soirée festive, ou une privatisation complète, notre brasserie tendance et fleurie est le lieu idéal pour créer des souvenirs inoubliables.

## On parle de nous !

Le **Café Cassette**, restaurant incontournable du **6ᵉ arrondissement de Paris**, est régulièrement mis à l’honneur par la presse et les guides gastronomiques. Découvrez les **articles, critiques et recommandations** consacrés à notre cuisine et à notre adresse sur la **rue de Rennes**, près de Tour Montparnasse.

Et si vous veniez **découvrir l’expérience Café Cassette par vous-même** ?

Diapositive précédente

Diapositive suivante

![Image 5](https://www.cafecassette.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/evenement-cafe-cassette-paris-6-1-683x1024.jpg)

## Accès et contact

**Adresse**

73 Rue de Rennes, 75006 Paris

**Contact**

Tél. 01 45 48 53 78

**Accès**

Ligne 12 – Rennes

Ligne 4 – Saint Sulpice

–

Ouvert tous les jours 

Lundi au vendredi : De 7 heures à 1 heures. 

Dimanche et lundi : De 7 heures à minuit.

Réservation conseillée.

## Suivez nous

## Le Café du Clown - Maison de café

![Image 1: IMG_2945.jpeg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/871b51_72d54ed136ae472a9e329ca970f8a911~mv2.jpeg/v1/fill/w_45,h_68,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/871b51_72d54ed136ae472a9e329ca970f8a911~mv2.jpeg)

## Une aventure germanopratine

En plein coeur du quartier Latin, dans le Marché Saint-Germain, le Café du Clown vous ouvre ses portes pour vous faire découvrir des cafés d’exception.

​

Notre sélection de Café ravira les papilles des experts comme des novices. Côté sucre, des pâtisseries Maison plairont aux plus gourmands…

![Image 3: IMG_2905.jpeg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/871b51_ae1992b297c94f4198ae5eeb5f143691~mv2.jpeg/v1/fill/w_54,h_81,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/871b51_ae1992b297c94f4198ae5eeb5f143691~mv2.jpeg)

Notre passion pour le café se traduit par un sens aiguisé du détail.

​

Nous apportons un soin tout particulier à chaque tasse, afin d’extraire pleinement l’essence du produit et de son terroir.

![Image 4: IMG_2945.jpeg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/871b51_72d54ed136ae472a9e329ca970f8a911~mv2.jpeg/v1/fill/w_45,h_68,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/871b51_72d54ed136ae472a9e329ca970f8a911~mv2.jpeg)

Title: Le Café du Rendez-Vous – Brasserie parisienne près de Denfert-Rochereau, cuisine de saison et happy hour 17h-23h

URL Source: http://www.lecafedurendezvous.com/

Markdown Content:
# Le Café du Rendez-Vous – Brasserie parisienne près de Denfert-Rochereau, cuisine de saison et happy hour 17h-23h
# Le Café du Rendez-Vous – Brasserie parisienne près de Denfert-Rochereau, cuisine de saison et happy hour 17h-23h

[0143210397](tel:0143210397)

[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/cafedurdv)[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/cafedurendezvous/)

![Image 1](https://lecafedurendezvous.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/logo_cafe_du_rdv-removebg-preview.png)

Le Café du Rendez-vous est votre adresse incontournable à Paris, située à deux pas du métro et RER Denfert-Rochereau, dans le dynamique 14e arrondissement. Ouverte 7 jours sur 7, notre brasserie vous propose une cuisine de saison élaborée à partir de produits frais, pour des plats savoureux qui évoluent au fil de l’année. Dégustez également notre carte de cocktails créatifs et profitez d’un happy hour prolongé de 17h à 23h. Que vous soyez en famille, entre amis ou pour un repas d’affaires, nous vous accueillons dans un cadre convivial et chaleureux.

Nous mettons à votre disposition un service sur-mesure pour vos repas de groupe ou événements d’entreprise. Que ce soit pour une réunion professionnelle, un déjeuner touristique ou une occasion spéciale, nous vous proposons des menus personnalisés adaptés à vos besoins. Avec un emplacement central, proche du métro Denfert-Rochereau, notre brasserie vous offre un cadre idéal pour partager un moment convivial autour d’une cuisine de qualité et d’un service attentif.

Groupes et réservation de moins de 12 personnes

[Réservation](https://lor.paris/r/le-cafe-du-rendez-vous-paris)

Groupes et réservation de plus de 12 personnes

[Réservation](https://lor.paris/r/le-cafe-du-rendez-vous-paris)

![Image 2: CAFE-DU-RENDEZ-VOUS-EQUIPES-1-scaled.jpg](https://lecafedurendezvous.com/wp-content/uploads/elementor/thumbs/CAFE-DU-RENDEZ-VOUS-EQUIPES-1-scaled-1-qyt2754ot6deco8fsa106ycoy3w9jio0fvf045sutc.jpg)

## Nos menus

*   [Petit déjeuner](https://lor.paris/m/le-cafe-du-rendez-vous-paris/JQIudLH9FBohyQyhtMVfgFLBuY3l3vZhjj9Lep9xA0m8wOj5KrcSd6vHeCNPI9RD7PBmKPTSYKvr7o5GutnYqP2tODonbYBgcqQk)
*   [Dîner](https://lor.paris/m/le-cafe-du-rendez-vous-paris/9RUDnQhhBWCA9SBOVWreljZqe7IVW4IbvT5W1mpQ2e1HvNaC5UKxU7nNo8hd3iToxxPCkkcZHMKBcZHFoUMNyqIh1zXexaVciXdk)
*   [Happy Hours](https://lor.paris/m/le-cafe-du-rendez-vous-paris/1cA5xbotFgIser7Od9dH18dG3Xubldi2acanRDdHpNGCIc3DOd5ICvaRQubKfYtaZL9wek1ZZuRDArY7C6G3e3G7o5tsnVdVBQwt)
*   [Toutes nos cartes](https://lor.paris/q/le-cafe-du-rendez-vous-paris)

## Happy Hours

Chez nous, l’happy hour est un moment à savourer ! De 17h à 23h, profitez de notre offre variée qui saura satisfaire toutes les envies. Nous vous proposons au choix à prix réduits plusieurs sortes de vins, des cocktails premium ainsi qu’une sélection de bières pression et du cidre.

Et pour accompagner vos boissons, nous avons pensé aux petites faims : un large choix de tapas, disponibles à l’unité ou en planche, ainsi que des assiettes de fromage, de charcuterie, ou mixtes. Que vous soyez en quête d’un apéritif léger ou d’un moment gourmand, notre happy hour répond à toutes vos attentes.

![Image 3](https://lecafedurendezvous.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/CAFE-DU-RENDEZ-VOUS-COCKTAIL-4-1152x1536-1-768x1024.jpg)

## Au restaurant

Au Café du Rendez-vous, notre chef Laurent s’attache à préparer une cuisine savoureuse avec des produits frais et de qualité. Il propose des plats qui font honneur à l’esprit des brasseries parisiennes. nous mettons tout en oeuvre pour que vous bénéficiez d’un service rapide, idéal pour un déjeuner professionnel sur le pouce ou avant une visite aux catacombes.

Que vous veniez pour un repas d’affaire ou pour vous détendre, vous trouverez ici des plats qui plaisent à tous.

![Image 1: Ville de Paris | Paris Musées](https://www.museeliberation-leclerc-moulin.paris.fr/themes/custom/museeliberation/dist/images/jumbotron-logos.svg)

![Image 2: Vue sur l'atrium "Paris libéré"](https://www.museeliberation-leclerc-moulin.paris.fr/sites/default/files/styles/576x264/public/2022-01/1L3A7018.jpg?itok=smrqyqXc)

4 Avenue du 

 colonel Henri Rol-Tanguy

 75014 Paris

 (Place Denfert-Rochereau) 

 Téléphone : 01 71 28 34 70

Le musée vous accueille du mardi au dimanche, de 10h à 18h.

 Collections permanentes gratuites et sans réservation

Exposition en cours

## Robert Capa. Photographe de guerre.

Robert Capa a inventé un style : le photographe de guerre, l’œil rivé à l’objectif, le scoop toujours à l’esprit. Témoin engagé, son...

[Voir l'exposition](https://www.museeliberation-leclerc-moulin.paris.fr/expositions/robert-capa-photographe-de-guerre)

![Image 3: Crédit : Robert Capa/International Center of Photography/Magnum Photos](https://www.museeliberation-leclerc-moulin.paris.fr/sites/default/files/styles/720x480/public/2025-12/bannieres_site_14.jpg?itok=IK1aQnB6)

![Image 4](https://www.museeliberation-leclerc-moulin.paris.fr/sites/default/files/styles/576x144/public/visuels/2019-10/denfert_coll._franco-_rogelio.jpg?itok=5s2sIIyX)

LE MUSEE

Le musée de la Libération de Paris – musée du général Leclerc – musée Jean Moulin porte les voix et les récits de celles et ceux qui ont résisté, et pose la question centrale de l’engagement, au cœur d’un monde en guerre.

[En savoir +](https://www.museeliberation-leclerc-moulin.paris.fr/le-musee)

![Image 5: Photo Anael Michel](https://www.museeliberation-leclerc-moulin.paris.fr/sites/default/files/styles/576x144/public/2026-04/bannieres_site_18.png?itok=YGg7CZFk)

Les vacances de printemps au musée

Découvrez le programme d'activités des vacances de printemps, du 18 avril au 3 mai 2026.

[Découvrir le programme](https://www.museeliberation-leclerc-moulin.paris.fr/les-vacances-de-printemps-au-musee)

## Newsletter

Pour suivre les actualités du musée, inscrivez-vous à l'infolettre !

[Inscription](https://870671f8.sibforms.com/serve/MUIFAKI5SWMhJPM6SYbHE1INaKSpc5iT_ht59XkxWrQJdUSrsCA7-P3UabHPg3Ia2potxVCzOwQibz-NIWSmSwZqx2e921_jfGAJi2JMyZSsKk_kZ7lox57CM5ZllXqhgkDoCV4umY4QblqV0S7F4WJtVm1ZjLneuJ5ig7mUfJk2hu53bJQ4zxy28yXs3KbeKUMVKNWfHVF81jmF)

![Image 6: Le général de Gaulle prononçant l'appel du 18 juin 1940 à la radio](https://www.museeliberation-leclerc-moulin.paris.fr/sites/default/files/styles/640x360/public/2025-06/4d81a93d-fc4e-4db7-b529-0982191ac16c.jpg?itok=FBJvcgct)

## A venir autour de l'exposition temporaire "'Robert Capa, photographe de guerre"

[Tout l'agenda](https://www.museeliberation-leclerc-moulin.paris.fr/agenda)

![Image 7: Photo d'archive : crédit collection Roger-Viollet / Roger-Viollet](https://www.museeliberation-leclerc-moulin.paris.fr/sites/default/files/styles/290x290/public/2026-02/conference_-_modele_7.png?itok=Ha5vPT0X)

http://cafedumarais.paris/.title: Café du Marais
http://cafedumarais.paris/.content_markdown:
Title: Bar Restaurant chaleureux et convivial dans le Marais

URL Source: http://cafedumarais.paris/

Markdown Content:
[Brunch & petit-déjeuner](https://cafedumarais.paris/#brunch)[Bistrot & café](https://cafedumarais.paris/#bistrot)[Afterworks & soirées](https://cafedumarais.paris/#afterworks)[Informations pratiques](https://cafedumarais.paris/#informations-pratiques)[Nous Contacter](https://cafedumarais.paris/contact.html)

![Image 1: Vue de la salle](https://cafedumarais.paris/images/cafe-du-marais-paris-restaurant.jpg)

![Image 2: Vue du bar](https://cafedumarais.paris/images/cafe-du-marais-paris-bar.jpg)

![Image 3: Brunch](https://cafedumarais.paris/images/cafe-du-marais-paris-cafe.jpg)

## Brunch et petit-déjeuner

Le classique café-croissant de la semaine ou le traditionnel brunch du weekend dans un havre de paix ? Bienvenue au Café du Marais, café parisien fleuri toute l'année et situé dans la charmante rue du Bourg Tibourg du 4e arrondissement de Paris.

Tous les jours à partir de 8h, nous vous proposons le classique petit-déjeuner à la française avec ses viennoiseries, mais également des oeufs, des gaufres et toasts salés pour satisfaire toutes les envies !

![Image 4: Restaurant](https://cafedumarais.paris/images/cafe-du-marais-paris-afterparty.jpg)

## Bistrot convivial et café toute la journée

Le lieu idéal pour votre pause déjeuner entre deux réunions ou pendant une séance shopping dans le Marais. Des plats de bistrots classiques comme des burgers, salades, entrecôtes, tartares côtoient des plats végétariens et plus modernes.

Notre carte vous permet également d'accompagner un thé, un café ou un latté d'une douceur le temps d'un goûter dans cette rue pittoresque du Marais.

![Image 5: Afterwork](https://cafedumarais.paris/images/cafe-du-marais-paris-love.jpg)

## Afterworks et soirées

Le soir, le Café du Marais se transforme en lieu idéal pour se rassembler autour d'un cocktail, d'un verre de vin, d'une bière et de tapas à partager. Pas de voitures, une bonne ambiance avec un fond musical soigneusement choisi, un lieu facilement accessible via de nombreux transports en communs.

Les plats du café sont également servis en soirée pour ceux qui veulent prolonger l'apéro par un dîner !

## INFORMATIONS PRATIQUES

Ouvert 7j/7 en continu de 8h à 2h.

3 Rue du Bourg Tibourg - 75004 Paris

(Métros : Hôtel de Ville, Saint-Paul).

Tél : 01 45 31 61 29

Title: Home - Freshwater Place

URL Source: https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/

Markdown Content:
## THERE'S NOTHING LIKE IT

![Image 1: FWP Logo White](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/FWP-Logo-White-1.png)

## OUR ETHOS

![Image 2: Paint Splash 2](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/p-paintsplash_2.png)

A PLACE TO COME HOME

Freshwater Place truly embodies the essence of our symbolic place of home-coming. Not only does it boast an unrivaled location, but it also offers a distinctive and exceptional living experience. Residents of Freshwater Place enjoy the advantages of inner city living while relishing in a fulfilling and enriching lifestyle. The commitment to quality and the continual investment in maintaining the highest living standards for owners and residents further enhance the appeal of this remarkable place.

![Image 3: Skyscrapers](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/p-home-freshwaterplace-01.jpg)

## THE RESIDENCES

![Image 4: The Residences](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/p-paintsplash_1.png)

ENDURING STYLE AND QUALITY

Designed by renowned architect Bates Smart, the residences at Freshwater Place define timeless sophistication and style, without compromising on everyday practicality.

![Image 5: Living Room Area](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/p-home-freshwaterplace-02.jpg)

![Image 6: Skyscraper](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/p-home-freshwaterplace-04b.jpg)

## HEALTH & WELLNESS

![Image 7: Paint Splash 4](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/p-paintsplash_4.png)

RESORT-STYLE AMENITIES FOR OPTIMAL WELLBEING

We believe that health and wellness are the well-spring of a life well lived. With pools, gyms and a private garden nested on the 10th floor, Freshwater Place provides a full suite of amenities for relaxation, rejuvenation and fitness.

![Image 8](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/p-home-freshwaterplace-04.jpg)

![Image 9: Indoor Pool](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/p-home-freshwaterplace-05-1.jpg)

## SERVICES & SECURITY

![Image 10: Paint Splash 2](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/p-paintsplash_2.png)

RESIDENT-FIRST HOSPITALITY

Life at Freshwater Place is characterised by tranquility, hospitality, and convenience. It is often described as a sanctuary nestled in the vibrant heart of Melbourne. Our dedicated and experienced concierge team is available round-the-clock, guaranteeing a secure environment and providing prompt assistance to residents whenever needed.

![Image 11](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/p-home-freshwaterplace-06d.jpg)

## OUR LOCATION

![Image 12: The Residences](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/p-paintsplash_1.png)

PRIME RIVERFRONT LIVING AT SOUTHBANK

Our location is truly unique right on the Yarra at the junction of Southgate, Crown, the CBD and South Melbourne, with access to Melbourne’s iconic landmarks and transportation hubs in minutes.

![Image 13](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/p-home-freshwaterplace-08.jpg)

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF COUNTRY

Freshwater Place stands on land that was an ancestral river crossing point and meeting place. We respectfully acknowledge the Traditional Owners of the land – the Wurundjeri and Bunurong peoples of the Eastern Kulin – and their connection to land and water. We pay our respect to their Elders, past, present and emerging.

Title: Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne | Belgian Beer in Melbourne | 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank VIC, Australia

URL Source: http://www.belgianbeercafemelbourne.com.au/

Markdown Content:
## Welcome to Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

At Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne - a family-owned and operated business - we pride ourselves on offering an extensive selection of beers from around the world. Our tap beer and bottle menu includes classic Belgian styles like Trappist, Dubbels, Tripels, and Saisons, as well as local and other international brews. We also serve an excellent selection of wines and cocktails, so there is definitely something for everyone. Come in for lunch, dinner, or just drinks. We're open 7 days a week.

Happenings

Functions / Events

## FUNCTIONS & EVENTS

Turn Event Stress into Event Success

![Image 1: Beer with friends](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_d1a4d1b0ab554de7ba2e5e9a3579c012~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_132,y_0,w_336,h_336/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/100BB2FF-703F-40A2-B3E8-52395DA69654_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### GATHERINGS

A birthday party? A going-away party? A promotion party? A large family gathering?Need a dedicated area? Need food and drinks? We can do it all!

![Image 2: Friendly get togethers](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_bebf171022ca4d33aa3fc0ea2e17b178~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_171,y_0,w_683,h_683/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/64A49FDC-D7EF-4C9C-A48C-1AE15BF7E5E2_edi.jpg)

### COCKTAIL PARTY

Whether you have in mind a cocktail soirée with a completely customisable menu of delectable canapés or an open tab session with a variety of delicious finger-food platters, we can cater for up to 300 people and suit every occasion.

![Image 3: Corporate lunches or Dinners](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f2751d8304cb4678aeb5ab64fe14a3bb~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_420,y_0,w_1080,h_1080/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/F6DACF4E-DF2C-4F91-AB67-BC7324A72849.jpeg)

### DINNER PARTIES

If you need to feed a group of hungry colleagues for lunch in a hurry, talk to us about pre-ordering. It's stress-free and inexpensive.

Otherwise, we can cater a sit-down lunch or dinner for up to 120 guests with a wide assortment of menus.

![Image 4: Corporate Gatherings](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_60a0917398054a7ab43aae0ce489e1df~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_74,y_0,w_163,h_163/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/28518312-839F-409C-BB2D-9F994D04E61A_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### Corporate

Whether you're organising a meeting, a symposium, a company, a dinner, or cocktail party, we'll help you get it right.

When you need to set up an industry networking gathering or nail a presentation to a large group of potential clients: let us assist you in fine-tuning it and hitting the right note.

### Function Enquiry Form

![Image 5: Fresh Yumbah Mussels](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_962a8024b6a54993940d5394e8812676~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/FreshMussels.png)

[![Image 6: Yumbah Aquiculture is the best](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_87376b93bc7c4b81904276730688cdb2~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_159,h_159,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Yumbah.jpg)](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/)

Belgian Beer Café is proud to partner with [Yumbah Sea Farms](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/) to deliver the highest quality mussels to our guests.

![Image 7: Stella is an awesome Belgian Beer](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f93a7f25067f44db82afefab7442328e~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Stella_Promo_edited.jpg)

## Location & Hours

Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

is located at 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank, Melbourne.

We are open every day from

12pm until late. Come and visit us for lunch, dinner, or drinks.

Follow us on [Untappd](https://untappd.com/v/belgian-beer-cafe

## Discover Melbourne Girls Grammar

Melbourne Girls Grammar is a place where challenge and choice create opportunities for every student to discover who she is meant to be.

A leader in girls’ education since 1893, our School has built an outstanding reputation for excellence, enabling students to develop with confidence and independence.

World-class learning programs, state-of-the-art facilities and an extensive co-curricular program inspire each student to achieve their best in the classroom and beyond.

To educate is to make an intervention into the lives of others. When we intervene, we do so with certain assumptions about the value of what we are doing and why. Building students' capacity for future readiness is a moral-ethical learning endeavour and one that cannot be left to chance.

 To achieve this, Melbourne Girls Grammar promotes a progressive, contemporary community of practice committed to providing personalised high quality curriculum, wellbeing and co-curricular programs that enable lifelong learning for every student. We are future focused and committed to inspiring our Grammarians and equipping them with the values, knowledge and skills to be ready to make their mark on the world.

![Image 1](https://cdn.mggs.vic.edu.au/app/uploads/2019/02/03120807/Toni-Meath-Preferred-wen-150x150.jpg)
Dr Toni Meath, Principal

[Read more from Toni](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/about-us/principals-welcome)

[Vision](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/#collapse_69bfa65f8de0b)

Melbourne Girls Grammar aspires to develop ethical women of action. Through a focus on learning, research and innovation, we will be recognised by our own community, the national and international community as a leading school in girls’ education.

[Mission](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/#collapse_69bfa65f8de1b)

In the pursuit of our vision, Melbourne Girls Grammar is committed to the provision of an exceptional education for girls with an emphasis on strong Christian values, high expectations, creativity and academic challenge.

Within a supportive and positive learning environment, girls will discover their passion and build their capacities for action and influence.

[Values](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/#collapse_69bfa65f8de21)

*   Integrity

*   Compassion

*   Courage

*   Self-discipline

Melbourne Girls Grammar is committed to the principles of a liberal democracy. To learn more, view our [Statement of Democratic Principles](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/statement-of-democratic-principles).

[](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/envisioning-the-future)

### Learn more

## How Can I Donate Skin?

In Australia, skin can only be donated from deceased donors.

You can register your wish to be a tissue donor in Australia on the DonateLife website: [www.donatelife.gov.au](http://www.donatelife.gov.au/).

It is also important to tell your family members your wishes as they will be asked to help facilitate donation at that time

## Become a Donor

[![Image 4: DTBV](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/uploads/2013/12/shutterstock_161208692-cropped-sml-LAPTOP.jpg)](https://dtbv.org.au/discover/how-do-i-become-a-donor/)

Find out how you can register your wish to be considered for tissue donation...

## About Tissue Donation

[![Image 5: DTBV](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/uploads/2013/12/shutterstock_162629372-Cropped-sml-BABY.jpg)](https://dtbv.org.au/discover/)

Tissue donation can enhance and even save people's lives. Find out more...

There are many reasons to become a tissue donor. Find out more...

# NewQuay Marina

## Discover NewQuay Marina at Docklands

NewQuay Marina at Docklands is Melbourne’s ultimate boating address.

Located adjacent to NewQuay Promenade, the marina offers premier access to waterfront restaurants, business hubs, major transport links and spectacular views of the city.

Discover this impressive 48 berth marina on Melbourne’s premier harbour – right in the heart of NewQuay, Docklands.

### Key Features

*   Flexible berth sizes, accommodating vessels 35ft+
*   Spectacular views of the city, Victoria Harbour and Bolte Bridge
*   Perfect backdrop for entertaining on your yacht
*   24 hour security cameras and security gates with restricted pass access
*   Fully serviced berths: power, water, sewer pump facilities and fire equipment all included
*   24 hour car parking pass included
*   Located opposite Marvel Stadium

Welcome to St. Mary’s Anglican Catholic Church in Denver, Colorado. We are a traditional Anglo-Catholic parish offering historical, sacramental worship centered on the Holy Eucharist. Join us for reverent high-church liturgy every Sunday, with Low Mass at 7:30 AM and Sung Mass at 9:30 AM. Rooted in Scripture, ancient tradition, and the beauty of holiness, St. Mary’s is a faithful witness to the Catholic and Apostolic faith.

[](http://nhakhachchinhphu.gov.vn/.id-banner)[](http://nhakhachchinhphu.gov.vn/.id-banner)

#### Tổng quan Nhà khách Chính phủ

Tọa lạc gần Hồ Hoàn Kiếm, trung tâm của Thủ đô, Nhà khách Chính phủ 12 Ngô Quyền là một trong những di tích lịch sử của Thành phố Hà Nội. Tòa nhà được xây dựng vào năm 1918, trên phần đất của chùa Báo Ân xa xưa, là một công trình tiêu biểu của phong cách kiến trúc cổ điển Pháp, với tổ hợp mặt bằng, mặt đứng rất cân xứng cùng với những chi tiết kiến trúc thuần túy Châu âu. Tòa nhà đã trải qua bề dày lịch sử chống Pháp và chống Mỹ cứu nước của dân tộc và là nơi đặt dấu ấn của Bác Hồ về đây làm việc năm 1945 với tên gọi **Bắc Bộ Phủ**.

Nhà khách Chính phủ 12 Ngô Quyền nằm trên hai mặt đường Ngô Quyền và Lê Thạch. Bên mặt đường Ngô Quyền là vườn hoa Diên Hồng (còn gọi là vườn hoa Con Cóc), mặt đường Lê Thạch là vườn hoa Lý Thái Tổ, tạo nên một không gian xanh, thoáng đãng cùng với quần thể bao quanh là những tòa nhà cổ kính rất phù hợp cho việc tổ chức các sự kiện quan trọng. Nhà khách Chính phủ cũng là vị trí trung tâm để di chuyển đến các địa danh nổi tiếng của Thủ đô Hà Nội: Hồ Hoàn Kiếm (khoảng 200m), Bưu điện Bờ hồ (khoảng 200m), Trung tâm phố cổ Hà Nội (khoảng 8

Title: 出雲大社東京分祠 | 縁結びの神様

URL Source: https://izumotaisya-tokyobunshi.com/

Markdown Content:
## 縁結びの神様 出雲大社

![Image 1: 出雲大社東京分祠](https://izumotaisya-tokyobunshi.com/images/home1.png)

ここ六本木の出雲大社東京分祠は出雲大社の御祭神大国主大神の御分霊を奉斎する都内唯一の分祠であり、 東部の要として、第八十代国造、出雲大社教初代管長の千家尊福公によって明治の初期に創設されました。

出雲大社の御祭神、大国主大神（おおくにぬしのおおかみ）は縁結びの神として、広く知られておりますが、 縁結びとは単に男女の縁を結ぶということだけではありません。私どもが立派に成長しますように、 社会が明るく楽しいものであるようにとお互いの幸福のためのすばらしい縁がむすばれるということなのです。

![Image 2: 祭儀の様子](https://izumotaisya-tokyobunshi.com/images/home2.png)

ダイコクさま、福の神として親しまれている大国主大神さまが、多くの方々から広く深い信仰を受けておられるのも この「むすび」という愛情を私どもに限りなくそそいでくださるからです。

当分祠では皆様方が、ダイコクさまの幸せのご縁をいただかれて、 明るく安らかに過ごすことが出来ますよう、日々お祈りいたしております。

## ご案内

![Image 3: 御祈願](https://izumotaisya-tokyobunshi.com/images/prayer.png)

### 御祈願

家内安全、商売繁盛、縁結、交通安全、初宮参り、七五三、厄除など、様々な御祈願を承っております。午前10時より午後3時まで、1時間毎に随時行っております。

[詳しく見る](https://izumotaisya-tokyobunshi.com/prayer.html)

![Image 4: 神前結婚式](https://izumotaisya-tokyobunshi.com/images/wedding_about2.jpg)

### 神前結婚式

明治31年より神前結婚式を執り行い、東京における神前結婚式の端緒を開きました。出雲式の祭儀を以って皆様の御婚儀を御奉仕申上げます。

[詳しく見る](https://izumotaisya-tokyobunshi.com/wedding.html)

![Image 5: 御札・御守](https://izumotaisya-tokyobunshi.com/images/shichigosan1.png)

### 御札・御守

御玉串、御木札、関札、釜社札、縁結守、縁むすびの糸、壮気健全守、厄除守、開運守など、各種御札・御守をお授けしております。

[詳しく見る](https://izumotaisya-tokyobunshi.com/omamori.html)

## 基本情報

*   名称 出雲大社東京分祠
*   住所〒106-0032 東京都港区六本木7-18-5
*   電話 03-3401-9301
*   受付時間 午前9時より午後5時まで
*   御祈祷時間 午前10時より午後3時まで（1時間毎に随時）
*   アクセス 東京メトロ日比谷線 六本木駅 2番出口より徒歩約1分

 都営地下鉄大江戸線 六本木駅 7番出口より徒歩約3分

Title: 【公式】新宿区大京町のGOOD MORNING CAFE NOWADAYS（グッドモーニングカフェ ナワデイズ）千駄ヶ谷エリアにオープン URL Source: https://nowadays.tokyo/ Markdown Content: ![Image 1: ナワデイズ](https://nowadays.tokyo/images/home/nowadays.png) 朝、昼、夜。 何気ない日常を過ごす 普段使いの場所として 上質でありながら寛げる場所。 9年前、千駄ヶ谷に初めてGOOD MORNING CAFEが誕生した時には、その名の通り「朝活」としてヘルシーやパワーと言ったフレーズをコンセプトにしたメニューをご提供していました。 多くの人に愛され、数々のアドバイスや要望を元に、ここに集う皆様のニーズを取り入れながら少しずつ変化してきました。3代目となるNOWADAYSはまず「上質」でありたいということ。私たちが提供するものに絶対的な自信とプライドを持って食べて頂きたいお料理やサービスをご用意しています。皆様には気兼ねなく私たちの扉を開けて欲しい。 1日の始まりを是非ナワデイズで！ ## NEWS&TOPICS * [![Image 2: 【2月1日(日)～28日(土)】三陸・常磐 うみうまフェア
ナワデイズの期間限定オリジナルメニュー！](https://cdn.balnibarbi.com/restaurant.balnibarbi.com/news/upload/bbb_2602_umiuma_tmb.jpg) 2026.01.31 【2月1日(日)～28日(土)】三陸・常磐 うみうまフェア ナワデイズの期間限定オリジナルメニュー！](https://nowadays.tokyo/news/article.php?id=14731) * [![Image 3: 「上質なディナー」が味わえるNOWADAYS DINNER COURSE](https://cdn.balnibarbi.com/restaurant.balnibarbi.com/news/upload/gmc-n_dinnercourse2506_ttl.jpg) 2025.06.24 「上質なディナー」が味わえるNOWADAYS DINNER COURSE](https://nowadays.tokyo/news/article.php?id=14401) * [![Image 4: 【2月1日(土)～28日(金)】『三陸・常磐 うみうまフェア』GMCナワデイズの期間限定オリジナルメニュー！](https://cdn.balnibarbi.com/restaurant.balnibarbi.com/news/upload/bbb_2501_umiuma_tmb.jpg) 2025.01.31 【2月1日(土)～28日(金)】『三陸・常磐 うみうまフェア』GMCナワデイズの期間限定オリジナルメニュー！](https://nowadays.tokyo/news/article.php?id=14232) ## PLAN 忘年会・新年会などにオススメ！ ## [PRIVATE PARTY 最大130席（立食）！大人数向けの半貸切・貸切パーティーも 半貸切や貸切にも対応！会社の忘年会や新年会・ウェディング・二次会、 企業パーティーなど柔軟にご対応いたします。 お気軽にご相談ください！ ![Image 5: 新宿区大京町のGOOD MORNING CAFE NOWADAYS（グッドモーニングカフェ ナワデイズ）で忘年会や貸切パーティー](https://nowadays.tokyo/images/home/plan9.jpg)](https://nowadays.tokyo/party/) ## ALL DAY USE RESTAURANT ## RECRUIT GOOD MORNING CAFE NOWADAYSでは一緒に働いてくれる仲間を大募集しています。 皆様のご応募お待ちしております。 公式求人LINEではカジュアル面談も行なっておりますので、不明点などあればお気軽にご相談ください。 [![Image 6: 友だち追加](https://scdn.line-apps.com/n/line_add_friends/btn/ja.png)](https://lin.ee/0XrBWZl) [JOIN US（中途採用）](https://balnibarbi-recruit.net/jobfind-pc/area/All?jobtype=00001%2C00002%2C00003%2C00004%2C00005%2C00006%2C00007%2C00008%2C00009%2C00010%2C00011%2C00012%2C00013%2C00014%2C00015%2C00016%2C00017%2C00018%2C00019%2C00020%2C00021%2C00022%2C00023%2C00024%2C00025%2C00026%2C00027%2C00028%2C00029%2C00030%2C00031%2C00032%2C00033%2C00034%2C00035%2C00036%2C00037%2C00038%2C00039%2C00040%2C00041%2C00049%2C00050%2C00055&freeword=GOOD%20MORNING%20CAFE%20NOWADAYS%28%E3%82%B0%E3%83%83%E3%83%89%E3%83%A2%E3%83%BC%E3%83%8B%E3%83%B3%E3%82%B0%E3%82%AB%E3%83%95%E3%82%A7%20%E3%83%8A%E3%83%AF%E3%83%87%E3%82%A4%E3%82%BA%29)[JOIN US（アルバイト）](https://balnibarbi-recruit.net/jobfind-pc/area/All?jobtype=00042%2C00043%2C00044%2C00045%2C00046%2C00047%2C00048%2C00053%2C00054%2C00057&freeword=GOOD%20MORNING%20CAFE%20NOWADAYS%28%E3%82%B0%E3%83%83%E3%83%89%E3%83%A2%E3%83%BC%E3%83%8B%E3%83%B3%E3%82%B0%E3%82%AB%E3%83%95%E3%82%A7%20%E3%83%8A%E3%83%AF%E3%83%87%E3%82%A4%E3%82%BA%29)

## ![Image 28: 果実屋珈琲STORY](https://www.kajitsuyacafe.jp/wp-content/themes/mngtr_basic/img/top/top_ttl1.webp?1777357345)

自然の恵みを贅沢に

厳選した果実たっぷりのメニューに、

芳ばしい香りが広がるオリジナルのブレンドコーヒー。

皆さまの日常の中にあるちょっぴり特別な時間を

「果実屋珈琲」でお過ごしください。

### 季節限定プレート

今が旬の果実や素材を贅沢に使った、果実屋珈琲ならではの季節で変わるプレート。おすすめサンドと合わせてお召し上がりください。

いつもSOL’S COFFEEの定期便をご利用いただき、誠にありがとうございます。 このたび、原材料費や輸送コストの高騰、 ならびに今後も安定した品質でコーヒーをお届けし続けるため、 2026年4月1日より、定期便の内容をリニューアルさせていただくことになりました。 それに伴い、価格・ラインナップ・発送頻度を下記の通り変更いたします。 ⬛︎ プラン詳細 【 毎月届く、いまのSOL'S COFFEE 】 飲む量やライフスタイルに合わせて、 ３種類のコースから定期便がお選びいただけます。  ①100g×2種(定番2種) 毎月のコーヒーに、ちょうどいいセット SOL'S COFFEEの定番ラインナップから、 バランスよく楽しめる2種類をセレクト。 「まずSOL'S COFFEEの豆を試したい」 「毎日飲むコーヒーを安定して楽しみたい」 そんな方におすすめのベーシックな内容です。  ②50g×3種(限定１種＋定番2種) 少しずつ、いろんな味を楽しみたい方へ 定番2種類に、その月におすすめの限定豆を1種類同封。 「新しい豆も気になるけど、飲みきれるか不安」 「その日の気分で豆を変えたい」...  
*   ![Image 2: 豆販売量の変更のお知らせ](https://solscoffee.com/cdn/shop/articles/DSC00271.jpg?v=1773195305&width=533) ### [豆販売量の変更のお知らせ](https://solscoffee.com/blogs/news/%E8%B1%86%E8%B2%A9%E5%A3%B2%E9%87%8F%E3%81%AE%E5%A4%89%E6%9B%B4%E3%81%AE%E3%81%8A%E7%9F%A5%E3%82%89%E3%81%9B)

2026年2月12日

いつもSOL’S COFFEEをご利用いただき、ありがとうございます。 このたび、オンラインストアでの豆の販売量が変更となりました。  ------------- 【変更前】100g 【変更後】150g / 250g / 500g 3種類からお選びいただけるようになりました！ -------------  今回の変更は、 ご自宅でのコーヒーの楽しみ方やペースに合わせて、 選んでいただける形にしたいという思いからです。 それぞれの販売量によって、 250gは250円お得,500gは750円お得 となる、値段設定となっております。  焙煎したてのコーヒーを、 その時の暮らしや気分に合わせて、 気持ちよく楽しんでいただけたら嬉しいです。  これからも、 毎日のコーヒーが心地よくなるような一杯をお届けしていきます。 引き続き、SOL’S COFFEEをどうぞよろしくお願いいたします。  
*   ![Image 3: 年末年始　営業時間のお知らせ](https://solscoffee.com/cdn/shop/articles/IMG_4446.jpg?v=1766022045&width=533) ### [年末年始 営業時間のお知らせ](https://solscoffee.com/blogs/news/%E5%B9%B4%E6%9C%AB%E5%B9%B4%E5%A7%8B-%E5%96%B6%E6%A5%AD%E6%99%82%E9%96%93%E3%81%AE%E3%81%8A%E7%9F%A5%E3%82%89%E3%81%9B)

2025年12月18日

年末年始の営業についてのお知らせ🎍 いつもSOL’S COFFEEをご利用いただき誠にありがとうございます。 年末年始の各店舗・オンラインストアの営業スケジュールは下記の通りとなります。 ⸻ 【 ROASTERY 】 12/29・12/30 休業 12/31 9:00-14:00（※豆販売・ドリンクのみ） 1/1・1/2 休業 1/3〜 通常営業 ⸻ 【 SOLAMACHI 】 通常営業 ⸻ 【 APARTMENT 】 12/28(日) 9:00-17:00 12/29(月)〜1/5(月) 休業 1/6(火)〜 通常営業 ⸻ 【 ONLINE STORE 】 年内最終発送：12/29...  
*   ![Image 4: 価格改定のお知らせ](https://solscoffee.com/cdn/shop/articles/IMG_2885.jpg?v=1743516944&width=533) ### [価格改定のお知らせ](https://solscoffee.com/blogs/news/%E4%BE%A1%E6%A0%BC%E6%94%B9%E5%AE%9A%E3%81%AE%E3%81%8A%E7%9F%A5%E3%82%89%E3%81%9B)

2025年4月1日

SOL’S COFFEEをいつもご利用いただき、誠にありがとうございます。この度、2025年4月より、原材料の価格高騰や品質向上のためのコスト増加により、メニューの価格を変更させていただくことになりました。より良い品質とサービスの提供を継続するために、何卒ご理解賜りますようお願い申し上げます。 これからもお客様に美味しいコーヒーをお届けできるよう最大限努力してまいります。 今後ともSOL’S COFFEEをよろしくお願いいたします。  ★ 豆販売の容量が、 150g→100gに変更となっております。 いつもご利用してくださる方にはご不便をおかけし致しますが、ご理解いただけますと幸いです  

## COFFEE BEANS

## **WE ARE...**

”Serendipity体験を通じてお客様理想の一杯を提供する”をミッションに、

お客様の生活に寄り添う毎日飲んでも体に優しい珈琲を日々提供しています。

## ONLINE STORE

*   ### [フラットなまち、ひらかれた店。自由さから生まれるセレンディピティ —— Backpackers...](https://solscoffee.com/blogs/solspeople/interview-backpackersjapan-sols)

2024年6月28日

創業から15周年を迎えたSOL’S COFFEEが、2013年から11年間に渡って拠点を構えてきた蔵前。その蔵前一号店としてオープンしたSOL’S COFFEE STANDが、2024年5月17日をもって閉店を迎えました。一つの節目となるこのタイミングで、蔵前を代表するホステルの一つでもあるNui.を運営するBackpackers' Japan取締役の石崎さんとSOL’S COFFEE代表アライリエコの対談インタビューが実現。同じく根を下ろす蔵前という土地を出発点に、人が集まる場や魅力的なまちの形成、これからの蔵前について伺いました。アライリエコ2009年にSOL’S COFFEEを立ち上げ、キッチンカーでの移動販売と自家焙煎コーヒー豆の通信販売を開始。その後、蔵前にてコーヒースタンドSOL’S COFFEEをオープン。現在では都内に5店舗、福井・若狭町に1店舗を構える。2022年、家業でもある「荒井鉄工所」の意志を継ぎ、日本製の珈琲器具メーカープロジェクト quissaco（キッサコ）を始動。エスプレッソメーカーや焙煎機の開発を手掛ける。石崎嵩人2010年に友人３人とともに株式会社Backpackers' Japanを創業。Nui. HOSTEL & BAR LOUNGE（東京・蔵前）など４軒のゲストハウス・ホステルを企画運営するほか、2020年からはキャンプ場やブルワリーを立ち上げるなど、事業の幅を広げている。  道にはみ出たソファ、お客さんもスタッフもみんなが自由に過ごす店 ーー SOL’S COFFEE STAND（以下、STAND店）のオープンが2013年、 Nui.の

https://sansoucafe.com/.title: SANSOU CAFE
https://sansoucafe.com/.content_markdown:
Title: 浅草カフェ・SANSOU CAFE- サンソウカフェ-  酵素玄米ごはんとグルテンフリースイーツカフェ・ヴィーガンメニュー・夜カフェ

URL Source: https://sansoucafe.com/

Markdown Content:
![Image 1](https://sansoucafe.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/p1.png)

![Image 2](https://sansoucafe.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/p3-1.jpg)

![Image 3](https://sansoucafe.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/p2-1.jpg)

浅草でゆっくり過ごせるカフェをお探しの方へ。

SANSOU CAFEでは、季節の食材と厳選した調味料を使い、身体にやさしい「基本食」を丁寧に手作りしています。

添加物を控え、消化に良い酵素玄米を中心に、心と身体が自然と整う食事を気軽に楽しめるカフェです。

浅草寺や雷門からも歩いてアクセスでき、観光の合間の休憩や、地元の方の日常使いにもご利用いただいています。

グルテンフリースイーツ・ヴィーガンメニューございます。

[【５月営業スケジュール】 （SANSOU CAFE 営業日） 水木：11:00-16:00 金土：](https://www.instagram.com/p/DXehNMgFPoP/)

[今月の季節のケーキは抹茶のガトーショコラです。 濃厚な抹茶の風味のケーキですので 是非お召し上がり](https://www.instagram.com/p/DXbD-UKjj0O/)

[- sansou cafe のさつまいもケーキは 蒸籠で蒸したさつまいもたっぷりの、健康的なグルテン](https://www.instagram.com/p/DXN5pIAD_RA/)

[薄着の季節になってきましたね！ sansou cafeガパオライスとハンバーグは 鶏胸肉とお豆腐で作](https://www.instagram.com/p/DXLRRn4j6_V/)

[SANSOU CAFEはお子様連れ大歓迎です![Image 4: 🕊️](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/1f54a.svg) ゆったり過ごせる空間で、ほっとひと息つきませんか？](https://www.instagram.com/p/DXI8u9vFNux/)

[このたび、SANSOU CAFEが日本洋菓子協会連合会機関誌「ガトー」に掲載されました。 このような](https://www.instagram.com/p/DW7zYiXD7yi/)

[sansou cafeは 都バス西浅草3丁目停留所から すぐの場所にあります❀ 近くは一葉桜(花と葉](https://www.instagram.com/p/DW2oTX6j1mL/)

[SANSOU CAFEのお料理はすべてグルテンフリーです。 ランチは16時までお召し上がりいただけま](https://www.instagram.com/p/DWp3l3Lj-nR/)

[Instagram でフォロー](https://www.instagram.com/sansoucafeasakusa/)

## ABOUT US

食を通して、笑顔がめぐる場所へ

SANSOU CAFEは「心からくつろげる時間」を大切に、季節の食材とやさしい調理で身体に負担の少ない料理を提供します。栄養豊富な酵素玄米を中心に、地元の方から観光の方まで気軽に楽しめる場所を目指しています。

[詳しく見る](https://sansoucafe.com/concept/)

![Image 5](https://sansoucafe.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/e3c0a4df53a2d4dd57ee1a5f933dd271.png)

## MENU

食をととのえるということ

SANSOU CAFEの料理は、身体が必要としている栄養をしっかり取り入れながら、

心まで満たされるように丁寧にお作りしています。

季節の食材を生かし、消化を助けるスパイスや厳選した調味料を使い、

添加物やトランス脂肪酸は極力使用していません。

また、ヴィーガンやグルテンフリーにも対応しております。

[詳しく見る](https://sansoucafe.com/menu/)

![Image 6](https://sansoucafe.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/f1933603f4c63e9704a20ac60914d4d2.png)
